title: Sprint 5 Demo Rehearsal Pack
policy_note: Live demo transcript defaults are online-first. Offline questions in this pack are support-path or harness references for Admin rehearsal only.

questions.title: Leadership vs. management comparison
questions.prompt: How do leaders and managers differ?

expected_evidence.why: Current indexed leadership comparison source for the default transcript question in this checkout.

expected_evidence.target: Subject Leader Manager Essence Change Stability
expected_evidence.why: The compact comparison table is the strongest citation anchor for a crisp leadership-vs-management answer.

questions.operator_note: Default transcript question for this checkout. Use early in the live run to show a clean cited distinction between leading people and managing work.

questions.title: Operating frequency range
questions.prompt: What is the Digisonde-4D operating frequency range?

expected_evidence.why: Current indexed technical manual that contains the Digisonde-4D specifications table.

expected_evidence.target: Frequency Range 0.5 - 30 MHz (all modes of operation)
expected_evidence.why: The answer should anchor to the specifications table instead of a loose prose mention.

questions.operator_note: Good engineering quick win when you want an answer with exact numbers and a direct citation into the specifications table.

questions.title: Calibration interval and review cadence

expected_evidence.why: Current indexed GUI smoke support document used for the offline/Admin rehearsal path.

expected_evidence.target: maintenance schedule follows quarterly review cycles
expected_evidence.why: GUI smoke and offline/Admin rehearsal should land on the exact interval plus cadence wording.

questions.operator_note: Offline/Admin support-path question. gui_demo_smoke uses this because it is reproduced safely in the current indexed demo corpus.

questions.title: Application server network settings
questions.prompt: What port does the application server use and what encryption standard is listed?

expected_evidence.why: Current indexed network configuration note with the port and TLS settings.
Security-focused demos should cite the exact network and encryption wording, not a paraphrase.

questions.operator_note: Use when the audience leans security-heavy and you want a short, source-bounded answer about server exposure and encryption.

questions.title: Matrix authority comparison
questions.prompt: How does project-manager authority change between weak, balanced, and strong matrix structures?

expected_evidence.target: Functional and Project Manager_s Duel - PMStudent.pdf
expected_evidence.why: Current indexed project-management source that contrasts authority levels across matrix structures.

expected_evidence.target: Full-time and at least as much formal authority as line manager if not more
expected_evidence.why: The strongest answer should distinguish the weak, balanced, and strong matrix authority levels using the document's role breakdown.

questions.operator_note: Use after the quick wins when you want to show a more nuanced program-management comparison with explicit authority language.
